content:
Welcome to the team! <:Pandia_love:1459078512303411261> 

This thread is for new volunteers who wish to work on translation. The goal of the test is to get a handle on an individual's translation style, as this is a volunteer-based community effort and thus prone to cause inconsistencies in terms of style when different people work on different sections. The general process will be for anyone seeking to do CN > EN translation work to first translate a short passage of the game's text, so that we can get a sense of how you translate text and your translation style and preferences. If you have any particular preferences as to a particular side story, dialogue, or area of the game, please ping me or Mercy and we can extract a short section of the text for you to work on (though as a team member you have access to the source files, so if you would prefer you can simply start work directly and send me anything that you feel is satisfactory). 

Once you have finished work on a short passage, the result can be sent to me directly in Discord via DM. Please note that if I ask any questions, they are not meant to be interrogatory and does not mean there is any issue with your work - generally, I will be looking to understand your thought process and translation strategies so that I can match it with the currently existing translated text. Members who pass the test will be assigned the <@&1419930759182942309> role, which is a pingable role used by other members of the team should they have questions regarding the original CN text when editing and proofreading. This helps us coordinate output to ensure that we do not lose any nuances or details in the original text, so that our translations can match the original authors' intent as accurately as possible.

Please note that this is not meant to be judgmental or restrictive - our goal is to facilitate consistent, high-quality contributions from the volunteer team, in order to minimize the reviewing and implementation workload necessary before it falls on Ace's and Mia's shoulders. Additionally, there are no penalties or issues should there be any issues with the result; we have a large workload of editing, proofreading, and playtesting to do, which you can actively contribute to without any restrictions. Should you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to any members of the English mod team!

To get started, simply post a message in this thread to affirm your desire for a translator role, and mention any preference you may have in regards to specific stories or content you would like to work on. If you already have anything in mind and wish to start work immediately, you may simply mention what you are translating in your message and begin, then send me the results after you feel you have translated a decent amount (generally, a single in-game scene will suffice, or any section of 50-100 lines). If you do not have anything in mind and would prefer we assign something to you, I will reach out to you via DM with a section of text to work on.

Once again, welcome to the team and we look forward to working together with you!
whoops didn't mean to ping, my bad <:KarenFeelGuilty:1439371066425475072>
